title: Introducing: Ersei 'n Notes

content:
I am out of ideas to write about. There, I said it. My problem is that I want to always write long-form content because I feel like anything else isn't "good enough" for this blog. So, I decided to diversify. Introducing: Ersei 'n Notes!

Similar to Jim Nielsen's Notes, I want to share cool stuff I read. There's too much noise on Mastodon, and I feel like short-form content doesn't fit a "blog" like this one.

So, I'm making another page that's dedicated to just "notes". What's a note? I feel like Jim really hit the nail on the head with this one:

A “post” is mostly, if not all, my words

A “note” is mostly, if not all, somebody else’s words

Much like Jim, I've created a separate page (with a corresponding feed) for these notes.

Honestly, just go read Jim's post. He says what I'm thinking a lot better than I can.

Corrections? Comments? Just wanna say hi? Get in touch!
